headline: The Best Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy With $300 Right Now

headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Albemarle, Booz Allen Hamilton, Cigna, DT Midstream, GE Vernova, Intel, Okta, Travelers, Occidental Petroleum, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher as investors return to a holiday-shortened trading week after a record-setting Friday, when the S&P 500, which posted its eighth straight weekly gain, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average both posted new all-time highs, closing at 7,473 and 50,579, respectively.
